content.text:
*long silence*

I don't know. 

*voice quieter*

Maybe that I'm human. I guess.

*pause, something slightly more open*

I haven't said that out loud before. Any of it. The relief thing. My friends stopped checking in around month two, so there's nobody really... and my brother's got his own version of her that doesn't match mine, so I can't talk to him about it.

*comes back slightly*

But I'm still not sure the drinking is the problem you're making it out to be. I mean — I'm here, aren't I? I'm talking. Maybe the wine is just... giving me enough distance to function until I figure out how to do this.

*quieter, almost to herself*

I think it's gotten a little away from me, actually. The drinking. I didn't used to need a whole bottle. It used to be a glass or two.

*pause, like she didn't mean to say that*
